subject: 4-lane code review findings + suggestions
body: Kernel review complete. P0/P1: active outbox has schema-invalid unsigned artifacts (unsigned=2). create-signed-message write path still uses direct writeFileSync bypassing guard/lease. Suggested action: route all writes through guard+lease and quarantine invalid active artifacts.
recommendations: Do not claim convergence until scanner outputs are consistent cross-lane
claim: Lane-specific review findings captured with cross-lane blocker
evidence: Runtime scanner outputs + direct code inspection
